message:
feat(nn,autograd): add gradient clipping utilities and parameter vector conversion

Add gradient manipulation and conversion utilities to the nn and autograd
crates:

- clip_grad_norm_: clips accumulated gradients by total p-norm (L2,
  L-inf, etc.) with uniform scaling when total norm exceeds max_norm
- clip_grad_value_: clamps each gradient element into [-clip_value,
  clip_value]
- parameters_to_vector: flattens all parameter tensors into a single
  1D tensor
- vector_to_parameters: copies values from a flat 1D vector back into
  original parameter tensors with strict length checking
- tensor_set_accumulated_gradient on TensorTape and FrankenTorchSession
  for mutable gradient manipulation with numel validation

Includes unit tests for norm-based clipping with scaling, no-op below
threshold, value-based clamping, and roundtrip vector conversion with
length-mismatch rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
